use_cases: Triggering navigation actions within a menu system
Serving as primary action buttons in dashboard interfaces
Creating interactive CTA buttons in landing pages
Implementing form submission controls with multiple visual states
Building accessible button controls in React applications
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI's Slot for polymorphic behavior and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Part of a navigation menu package, this button provides accessible, themeable interactive controls with standard hover states for web applications.
